title: Creative Minds Origin (Ver.W)
description: Become a god with this addon to imaindoge's Origin Creative Minds, which adds time stopping powers, full teleportation, a more dynamic creative mode, and infinite scaling. No OP/cheats required.
body:
# Overview
- Revamps one power: Creative Impact
- Adds three new powers: Timestop, Teleportation, and Out of shape
- Since Creative Minds was not released on discord, it will come bundled with the datapack.
- Does NOT require cheats or OP to be enabled.
- Work with both Fabric AND Forge.
## Creative minds
- You are a creature of high intellect, creating anything with the touch of your fingertips. Your ancestors were gods in block form, and thus you were created. You can wield immense godlike powers, which scales with your player level.
### Creative Impact
- Your knowledge of the world exceeds many. Using your primary key allows you to enter the creative field, for 5 seconds. 
- Each level increases the max duration of your creative state by 0.25 seconds. 
- Sneaking will put you into spectator mode instead, for a much longer duration.
### Timestop
- Stops time in an expanding sphere around you. 
- All entities and projectiles will be frozen except for the user, and they cannot die until time resumes. 
- Each level increases the max duration by 0.5 seconds and the radius by 1.5 blocks.
### Out of shape
- Overeliance on your godlike powers means your physical body is lackluster. 
- You have 5 less hearts. Every level increses your health by one.
### Teleportation
- Brings up a menu that lets you teleport to any coordinates, in any dimension.
### Creative flow
- Your prowess is creativity causes magenta flow and enchantment table particles to fly around you while you are in your creative state.
### Void watchers
- Upon your fall from the plains of reality, the Void Watchers tear a hole into the void to consume your items, all incoming items, and mobs. 
# Final notes
- This datapack (including the release bundled with the original) was made with the explicit permission of the original creator.
- Made as a commission. 
- Join the discord server to suggest new features, ports, or report bugs.
